ns0:entry.ns0:title: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
Language: c
High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 155 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS-Kernel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS-Kernel
Language: c
FreeRTOS kernel files only, submoduled into https://github.com/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS and various other repos.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
Language: c
An open source, portable, easy to use, readable and flexible TLS library, and reference implementation of the PSA Cryptography API. Releases are on a varying cadence, typically around 3 - 6 months between releases.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenTenBase/OpenTenBase
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenTenBase/OpenTenBase
Language: c
OpenTenBase is an enterprise-level distributed HTAP open source database.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenVPN/openvpn
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenVPN/openvpn
Language: c
OpenVPN is an open source VPN daemon

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bol-van/zapret
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bol-van/zapret
Language: c
DPI bypass multi platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: capstone-engine/capstone
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/capstone-engine/capstone
Language: c
Capstone disassembly/disassembler framework for ARM, ARM64 (ARMv8), Alpha, BPF, Ethereum VM, HPPA, LoongArch, M68K, M680X, Mips, MOS65XX, PPC, RISC-V(rv32G/rv64G), SH, Sparc, SystemZ, TMS320C64X, TriCore, Webassembly, XCore and X86.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: curl/curl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/curl/curl
Language: c
A command line tool and library for transferring data with URL syntax, supporting DICT, FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, GOPHERS, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, MQTT, MQTTS, POP3, POP3S, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMB, SMBS, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET, TFTP, WS and WSS. libcurl offers a myriad of powerful features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: esnet/iperf
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/esnet/iperf
Language: c
iperf3: A TCP, UDP, and SCTP network bandwidth measurement tool

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ffmpegwasm/ffmpeg.wasm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ffmpegwasm/ffmpeg.wasm
Language: c
FFmpeg for browser, powered by WebAssembly

ns0:entry.ns0:title: glfw/glfw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/glfw/glfw
Language: c
A multi-platform library for OpenGL, OpenGL ES, Vulkan, window and input

ns0:entry.ns0:title: littlefs-project/littlefs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/littlefs-project/littlefs
Language: c
A little fail-safe filesystem designed for microcontrollers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: netdata/netdata
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/netdata/netdata
Language: c
The fastest path to AI-powered full stack observability, even for lean teams.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nothings/stb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nothings/stb
Language: c
stb single-file public domain libraries for C/C++

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openssl/openssl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openssl/openssl
Language: c
General purpose TLS and crypto library

ns0:entry.ns0:title: qmk/qmk_firmware
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/qmk/qmk_firmware
Language: c
Open-source keyboard firmware for Atmel AVR and Arm USB families

ns0:entry.ns0:title: systemd/systemd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/systemd/systemd
Language: c
The systemd System and Service Manager

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tianocore/edk2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tianocore/edk2
Language: c
EDK II

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vChewing/vChewing-macOS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vChewing/vChewing-macOS
Language: c
唯音輸入法 macOS 版，恐怕是截至目前為止在功能多樣性方面最強的第三方免費 macOS 系統專用輸入法，採純 Swift 語言寫就。唯音的著力點是盡可能在力所能及的範圍內將整個產品的功能做得更好用，搭配特製的簡體中文與繁體中文專用辭庫。是純粹的簡體中文注音輸入法（也內贈原生繁體中文輸入模式），更具諸多唯音特色功能。目前研發管理工作均在 AtomGit 進行。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
Language: c
Primary Git Repository for the Zephyr Project. Zephyr is a new generation, scalable, optimized, secure RTOS for multiple hardware architectures.
